articles.title: Gold, silver rate today: Yellow metal steadies; silver tumbles
articles.summary: Gold is headed for its second straight weekly decline as renewed tensions between the US and Iran continue to fuel inflation concerns and strengthen expectations of higher US interest rates. The prospect of tighter monetary policy has limited gains in the precious metal despite safe-haven demand.

articles.title: TS EAMCET 2026 Phase 1 seat allotment to be released today; online self-reporting begins after allotment
articles.summary: The Telangana Council of Higher Education is scheduled to release the TS EAMCET (TG EAPCET) 2026 Phase 1 seat allotment result today, July 10, 2026. Candidates can check their provisional allotment status on the official counselling portal after the link is activated.

articles.title: Are schools closed in Telangana today? Private schools suspend classes amid bandh
articles.summary: Many private and corporate schools across Telangana are closed today, July 10, 2026, because of a statewide bandh organised by student groups, while the state government has not declared an official holiday. Government schools have received no closure notification, although protests may affect normal operations.

articles.title: Karnataka UUCMS semester results 2026 declared at uucms.karnataka.gov.in; UG and PG students can download digital marks cards here
articles.summary: The Department of Higher Education, Government of Karnataka, has announced the UUCMS 2026 semester results for undergraduate and postgraduate courses across participating state universities. Students can download their provisional digital marks cards by logging into the unified portal with their enrolment number and password.

articles.title: Dhamaal 4 Movie Review and Release Live Updates
articles.summary: The beloved characters of Adi (Played by Arshad Warsi) and Manav (Played by Jaaved Jaaferi) from the popular 'Dhamaal' franchise enjoy a separate fanbase. Actress Sanjeeda Shaikh, who has joined the 'Dhamaal' family for the latest franchise, 'Dhamaal 4', also seems to be a fan of their natural chemistry and comic timing.
